chapter_title.en: The Reward of Voluntary Prayers During the Time of Heedlessness

text: 1566 - وَ رَوَى عِمْرَانُ اَلْحَلَبِيُّ عَنْهُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: «يَنْبَغِي تَخْفِيفُ اَلصَّلاَةِ مِنْ أَجْلِ اَلسَّهْوِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1566 - Imran Al-Halabi narrated from Imam (as) that He said:
"It is recommended to lighten (shorten) the prayer because of forgetfulness."
